query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scan_risk_cards (
    id int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    riskId varchar(128) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    assetId varchar(128) NOT NULL,
    finalScore double NOT NULL,
    componentCvss double NOT NULL,
    componentCarver double NOT NULL,
    componentBia double NOT NULL,
    confidenceWeight double NOT NULL,
    summary text NOT NULL,
    whyItMatters text,
    evidence json,
    recommendations json NOT NULL,
    riskCardCreatedAt bigint NOT NULL
  )
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scan_risk_cards (
    id int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    riskId varchar(128) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    assetId varchar(128) NOT NULL,
    finalScore double NOT NULL,
    componentCvss double NOT NULL,
    componentCarver double NOT NULL,
    componentBia double NOT NULL,
    confidenceWeight double NOT NULL,
    summary text NOT NULL,
    whyItMatters text,
    evidence json,
    recommendations json NOT NULL,
    riskCardCreatedAt bigint NOT NULL
  )
